channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Spilt rubbish bags on pavement, 18th May
item.description:
Rubbish on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter everywhere, 18th May
item.description:
Black bags put out last night are now ripped open and the contents distributed all over the street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 135, Maple Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grab bag full of rubbish, 18th May
item.description:
This bag been dumped here for over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 155, Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unsuitable bin leading to daily overflow, 18th May
item.description:
Need for a bin with a lid to avoid hygiene issues

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Park Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in shared alleyway at the back of 7 Isla Rd, 18th May
item.description:
Junk being thrown into the alleyway behind 7 Isla Road. This is a shared alleyway, with no access via the end as it's gated.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Isla Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bin & rubbish bags dumped, 18th May
item.description:
Bexleyheath Bus Garage bus stop rubbish bin appears broken still and there are two fresh rubbish bags dumped next to the bin blocking foot path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned for over 6 months, 18th May
item.description:
This car is one of a number of vehicles left on the square by a gentleman who lives on Berkshire Road. It has been with us so long now that it's tax and MOT have expired.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Leabank Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Narrow pavement blocked, 18th May
item.description:
Overgrowing vegetation has been an issue for months and now someone has started chaining a large cargo bike to the post and blocking the pavement completely

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike, 18th May
item.description:
Abandoned bike thats always on the floor and somtimes falls on people's cars and causes damage

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alexandra Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress fly tipped, 18th May
item.description:
Single mattress fly tipped, this area is regularly being flytipped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kinveachy Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish everywhere, 18th May
item.description:
Rubbish and flying tipping. Some people use this area as public toilets

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hobbs Place Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds and overgrown bushes, 18th May
item.description:
The alleyway between Whitely Road and Durning Road needs clearing and the weeds cut back. It’s been left in this condition since the beginning of the year and is becoming increasingly overgrown.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32, Whiteley Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Palace Road needs Weeding+Sweeping, 18th May
item.description:
A large number of weeds remain uncleared and the road/pavement don't appear to have been swept at all for months.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Palace Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 men dumping waste behind Westlake SE16 2DT, 18th May
item.description:
Two men have been dumping waste in our communal bins throughout the night. Their license plates were both covered. There is no space left in the bins for the community. This happens often.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101-130, Rotherhithe New Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fly tipping mess in front of house, 18th May
item.description:
Large amount of fly tipping had been sitting here for a few weeks. Just at the beginning of Maud Cashmore way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maud Cashmore Way, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging bushes, trees encroaching over the public footpath, from the majority of the properties on Westmoreland Road, 17th May
item.description:
Overhanging bushes from the majority of properties/ flats reducing the pavement width on Westmoreland Road. Needs urgent attention as a sign of neglect, need cutting back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 80, Westmoreland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th May
item.description:
Please collect!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Southill Woods is unkemp, overgrown, full of weeds stinging nettles and neglected by the council., 17th May
item.description:
South Hill Woods is a disgrace. Unkemp, overgrown, full of weeds stinging nettles etc and basically ignored by the parks department . Please tidy it up as this is not a suitable memorial to Q E 2. Thank you in anticipation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tootswood Road, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside garvey house, 17th May
item.description:
Flytipping and rubbish in front of metal bin based outside Garvey House, Southwold Rd, E5
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dennington Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside gaines house, southwold rd, e5, 17th May
item.description:
Flytipping and rubbish on the floor in front of metal bins based outside Gaines House, Southwold Rd, E5
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dennington Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
